arguments.command:
cd /tmp/sv-2735a0384daf40aca62abf0064ae6a98 && mkdir -p symbols && \
for lib_info in \
  "libmonosgen-2.0.so:1eb39fc72918c7c6c0c610b79eb3d3d47b2f81be" \
  "libSystem.Native.so:7a3b5c9d1e4f6082a3c5d7e9f1b2d4a6c8e0f213" \
  "libSystem.Globalization.Native.so:2f4a6b8c0d2e4f6a8c0e2f4a6b8c0d2e4f6a8c0e"; do
  IFS=':' read -r filename buildid <<< "$lib_info"
  echo "=== Trying $filename (BuildId: $buildid) ==="
  for pattern in "elf-buildid-sym-$buildid" "elf-buildid-$buildid"; do
    url="https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/${filename}/${pattern}/${filename}"
    echo "  Trying: $url"
    code=$(curl -sS -o "symbols/${filename}" -w "%{http_code}" --max-time 15 "$url" 2>&1)
    echo "  HTTP $code"
    if [ "$code" = "200" ]; then
      file "symbols/${filename}"
      break
    else
      rm -f "symbols/${filename}"
    fi
  done
done
